---
id: add-addresses-to-a-webhook

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add addresses to a webhook"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/webhook/add-addresses"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Associate new addresses with an existing webhook to listen for their events.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"API-SECRET","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The secret API key for authentication."},{"name":"apiKey","in":"query","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The public API key for authentication."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"webhookId":{"type":"string"},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"WebhookAddAddressesRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Addresses successfully added to the webhook.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"webhookId":{"type":"string"},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"WebhookAddAddressesRequest"}}}}},"403":{"description":"Access to the resource is forbidden.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"statusCode":{"type":"integer","example":403},"errorMessage":{"type":"string","example":"Forbidden resource"},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Forbidden"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
